summary: Iteration 5 frontend verification PASSED. Calendar fully removed; 3-tab bottom nav, StreakBadge (0 -> 1 after task toggle), SmartSuggestions chip row above task list (3 chips for current hour: walk, lunch, focus-any), clicking a chip creates a task. TaskCard action row has exactly 4 buttons (start-timer/share/edit/delete) and no gcal-task button. LUMORA brand visible. Shopping & Me Time pages load with no console/UI errors.
passed: Bottom nav has exactly 3 buttons (nav-tasks-btn, nav-shopping-btn, nav-metime-btn); nav-calendar-btn absent
LUMORA brand text visible in header
Smart-suggestions container visible with 3 chips for current hour (suggestion-walk-btn, suggestion-lunch-btn, suggestion-focus-any-btn)
Clicking suggestion-walk-btn creates a new task (count 2 -> 3)
Toggling a task bumps streak-count from 0 -> 1 (bumpStreak runs)
TaskCard horizontal action row has 4 buttons (start-timer-{id}, share-task-{id}, edit-task-{id}, delete-task-{id}); gcal-task-{id} removed
Navigation to Me Time page works
No error elements found in DOM, no console errors observed
notes: Midnight reset (useTasks midnight effect) was not verified directly — page loaded without crash on mount, which is the only same-day verification possible without altering system time.
